name: api-to-production
description: Full API from design to deployed. Design the API, plan the database, harden security, generate tests, set up CI/CD, and write the docs. Ship it.

config.instruction: Design the REST API: endpoints, schemas, auth, rate limiting, versioning.
Design the database to support the API. Tables, relationships, indexes, migrations.
Security review: auth vulnerabilities, injection risks, CORS, rate limiting, secrets management. Fix everything.
Generate test cases for every endpoint: happy path, validation errors, auth failures, edge cases. Include integration tests.
Set up CI/CD: test on PR, build on merge, deploy on tag. Staging + production. Rollback strategy.
Write API documentation: getting started, authentication, endpoint reference, error codes, examples, rate limits.
